creator: winter@jurai.net
text:
On Wed, 18 Aug 1999 h.wicaksono@cgiar.org wrote:
> I wanna asy you one thing. I have a computer with an ethernet card
> Realtek 8019 that is not supported by freebsd (freebsd currently
> support for 8219/8319). Do you have a solution?

The 8019 looks like an NE2000.  Try the 'ed' driver.
